entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop susceptible to wilt caused by Fusarium udum

entities.name: WILT
entities.description: A disease condition in pigeonpea caused by the fungal pathogen Fusarium udum

entities.name: FUSARIUM UDUM
entities.description: A fungal organism that causes wilt in pigeonpea crops

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The geographic location where pigeonpea is grown and affected by wilt

entities.name: INDUCED SYSTEMIC RESISTANCE
entities.description: A biological concept where plants are primed for defense against pathogens

entities.name: TRICHODERMA HARZIANUM
entities.description: A fungal bio-control agent that inhibits the growth of Fusarium udum

entities.name: MANCOZEB
entities.description: A contact fungicide used to inhibit the mycelial growth of Fusarium udum

entities.name: CAPTON
entities.description: A contact fungicide used to inhibit the mycelial growth of Fusarium udum

entities.name: THIOPHANATE METHYL
entities.description: A systemic fungicide used to inhibit the mycelial growth of Fusarium udum

entities.name: PSEUDOMONAS FLUORESCENS
entities.description: A bacterial bio-control agent that reduces wilt incidence and increases vigour index

entities.name: PSEUDOMONAS PUTIDA
entities.description: A bacterial bio-control agent that reduces wilt incidence and increases vigour index

entities.name: VIGOUR INDEX
entities.description: A trait measuring the health and growth potential of seeds and seedlings

entities.name: DEFENSE RELATED ENZYMES
entities.description: Biological traits including PO, PPO, and PAL that contribute to plant resistance

entities.name: BSMR-736
entities.description: A moderately resistant cultivar of pigeonpea

entities.name: ICP-2376
entities.description: A susceptible cultivar of pigeonpea

entities.name: GLASS HOUSE EXPERIMENT
entities.description: A method of controlled environment testing for wilt incidence

entities.name: KHARIF SEASON
entities.description: A specific agricultural growing season in India

entities.name: CARBENDAZIM
entities.description: A fungicide used in soil drenching to reduce wilt and increase yield

entities.name: PGPR
entities.description: Plant Growth Promoting Rhizobacteria used as bio-control agents

entities.name: FYM
entities.description: Farm Yard Manure used as a medium for PGPR soil application

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: A trait representing the agricultural productivity of the crop

entities.name: MYCELIAL INHIBITION
entities.description: A concept referring to the reduction of fungal mycelium growth
